concerns.text: The specification assumes that computing ~200 M pairwise correlations for ~20 k genes on a GitHub Actions runner with only 2 CPU cores and 7 GB RAM will finish within the 6‑hour wall‑clock budget (FR‑004, FR‑009, and the Assumptions section). Even with block‑wise streaming, the required ~10 B arithmetic operations are unlikely to complete in this environment, making the core analysis infeasible and jeopardizing the ability to generate the required evaluation metrics.
